reasoning: Emotional (60%): Warm orange-brown leather with sky-blue/white cuff trim delivers a bright, charming, adventurous read consistent with Hyrule toy-diorama mood. Silhouette is chunky and friendly; no grim or scary elements. Color saturation on the orange tones is strong; blue accent adds brightness pop. Score ~8. Technical (40%): Clear 1px hard outlines visible at all zoom panels; 3-tone hard shading (highlight/mid/shadow) on the leather body with no anti-aliasing bleed; pixels are grid-snapped with no sub-pixel drift observable. Matches Denzi armor reference quality in line weight and palette discipline. Score ~8. Combined: 0.6×8 + 0.4×8 = 8.0. Verdict: pass.
